name: Mobile Obstetrics Monitoring (MOM)
description: Philips Mobile Obstetrics Monitoring (MOM) is a software solution that allows community healthcare workers to enhance maternal care in community settings

taxonomy.sub_category: Mobile Obstetrics Monitoring (MOM) Updated on June 8, 2024 · Created on August 28, 2017 Mobile Obstetrics Monitoring (MOM) Philips Mobile Obstetrics Monitoring (MOM) is a software solution that allows community healthcare workers to enhance maternal care in community settings Developed By Philips Tested By Mobile Obstetrics Monitoring (MOM) Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description Philips Mobile Obstetrics Monitoring (MOM) is a software solution that allows community healthcare workers to perform antenatal risk stratification, receive diagnostic assistance, and assess a patient’s progress via a mobile device to enhance maternal care in community settings. Target SDGs SDG 3: Good Health and Well-Being Target Users (Target Impact Group) Community, Public Sector Agencies, NGOs Distributors / Implementing Organizations Philips. Regions Worldwide Manufacturing/Building Method Software development Intellectural Property Type Trademark User Provision Model Direct from manufacturer. Distributions to Date Status Unknown Telecommunication service required Mobile telecommunication network required for the service to work properly. Level of connection service needed Minimum 2G connectivity required. Additional features required None. Device(s) required End-users require smart-phone to access service’s app. For data storage a site is required in order to deploy and operate a web server. Permanent network connectivity required (Y/N) End-users with mobile phone require ocasional network connection to upload and consult information. Web-server requires permanent network connection. Two way communication (Y/N) Yes. Usage rate (%) Unknown Literacy support (Y/N) Yes. Languages available Unknown Operating system and version Unknown Power requirements End-users with mobile phone require ocasional power supply. Web-server requires permanent power supply. eHealth application Data collection & analytics. Design Specifications The MOM service features two mobile phone apps. The first app allows midwives to collect vital measurement data such as weight, blood pressure and temperature, and sync it to the MOM web portal. The second lets doctors track this data and review a woman’s pregnancy condition. Specialists at regional primary care centers can also access the data via a MOM web portal to monitor women’s conditions and assess high-risk pregnancies via a dashboard interface. Product Schematics Technical Support Users can contact Philips for further information and technical support. Replacement Components N/A Lifecycle N/A Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters MoM enables end users can review and manage each obstetric case which facilitates timely referral of the patient to an appropriate healthcare center for further management if needed. Vetted Performance Status None. Safety N/A Complementary Technical Systems None Academic Research and References Priyanka Bhat, Akshar Joshi, Tanmay S Bhat, Prof. Rajesh N V.
